description: A business discovers it under-withheld Medicare taxes for an employee in a previous quarter and needs to correct the error.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific payroll period and employee with the error.
Calculate the amount of the under-withholding.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately determines the amount of the tax shortfall.

nodes.task_description: Prepare and file Form 941-X, Adjusted Employer's Quarterly Federal Tax Return or Claim for Refund, to correct the error.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully prepares the corrective form.
